name: No-Cook Georgia Peachberry Jam
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Peaches, peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
This is a recipe from Certo for August 1993.
1. Measure the prepared fruits into a large bowl.
2. Add sugar to the fruit and mix well. Let stand for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the Certo liquid fruit pectin and lemon juice.
4. Continue stirring for 3 minutes until most of the sugar is dissolved.
5. Pour the mixture into clean jars or plastic containers. Cover tightly with lids.
6. Allow to set at room temperature for 24 hours, or until firm.
7. Store in the freezer or refrigerator for up to 3 weeks.
Makes 4 1/2 cups
